use_cases.expected_behavior: Includes company overview, decision makers, news triggers, pain points, outreach hooks
5 emails with subjects, clear purpose each, under 150 words, no slop, clear CTAs
Flags stale deals, provides next actions, calculates health metrics, prioritizes
Calculates weighted value, shows best/worst case, gap analysis, risk assessment
Identifies BATNA, calculates reservation price, suggests concessions, provides scripts
Attendee research, questions, company context, agenda, anticipated objections
Identifies loss reason, categorizes, suggests remediation, updates playbook
GO/NO-GO recommendation, multi-dimension scoring, red flags, win probability
